documents.name: PayPal Receive Funds and Automatic Transfer Agreement
COMMERCIAL ENTITY AGREEMENT FOR PAYPAL PAYMENT CARD FUNDED PROCESSING SERVICES
Notice of Amendment(s) to the Asia Pacific, certain European and Latin American countries, Middle East and Africa PayPal Agreement(s)

case.title: First-party cookies are used
case.description: First-party cookies only belong to the domain of the service and not a third party.

points.title: Users agree not to use the service for illegal purposes

case.title: You agree not to use the service for illegal purposes
case.description: The user agrees not to commit any unlawful acts through the use of the website, including the posting of illegal content or messaging.

points.title: This service does not force users into binding arbitration

case.title: You aren’t forced into binding arbitration in case of disputes
case.description: Binding Arbitration is a dispute resolution method involving a neutral third party which will render a decision instead of going to court. Since the arbitrator can decide the outgoing of a dispute without evidences or a legal basis, it is preferable that users decide whether they want or not their dispute to be resolved this way.

case.title: You waive your moral rights
case.description:
Moral rights are rights to creators of literary, dramatic, musical and artistic works, as well as directors of films.

"The moral rights include the right of attribution, the right to have a work published anonymously or pseudonymously, and the right to the integrity of the work. The preserving of the integrity of the work allows the author to object to alteration, distortion, or mutilation of the work that is "prejudicial to the author's honor or reputation". Anything else that may detract from the artist's relationship with the work even after it leaves the artist's possession or ownership may bring these moral rights into play. Moral rights are distinct from any economic rights tied to copyrights. Even if an artist has assigned his or her copyright rights to a work to a third party, he or she still maintains the moral rights to the work." -Wikipedia

In general, any terms that use the exact words "moral rights" as rights that are waived will fall under this Case.

points.title: You must create an account to use this service

case.title: You must create an account to use this service
case.description: You must provide the service with your information in order to use it

points.title: Your information is only shared with third parties when given specific consent

case.title: Your information is only shared with third parties when given specific consent
case.description: The service does not share user information with any third parties unless users specifically give it permission to do so.

points.title: The service does not guarantee accuracy or reliability of the information provided

case.title: The service does not guarantee accuracy or reliability of the information provided
case.description: This service makes no warranty regarding the accuracy or reliability of any information that is given on its website or the results that may be obtained from the use of the service.

points.title: Invalidity of any portion of the Terms of Service does not entail invalidity of its remainder

case.title: Invalidity of any portion of the Terms of Service does not entail invalidity of its remainder
case.description: Should any portion of the Terms of Service be unenforceable or invalid, that portion will be enforced to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law and the remainder of the TOS will remain valid and enforceable.

points.title: The court of law governing the terms is in a jurisdiction that is less friendly to user privacy protection.

case.title: The court of law governing the terms is in a jurisdiction that is less friendly to user privacy protection
case.description: The Terms are governed by the applicable laws of a jurisdiction known for weak data regulations and poor user privacy protection. Usually contributors will need to explain in the Analysis view of each point linked to this Case the reason why it shall be applied.

points.title: You can opt out of targeted advertising

case.title: You can opt out of targeted advertising
case.description: The service employs your data to target ads to you, but you can opt-out of this interest-based advertising.

points.title: You agree not to submit libelous, harassing or threatening content

case.title: You agree not to submit libelous, harassing or threatening content
case.description: This service prohibits users from submitting content of a variety of types. This can include content that is unlawful, harassing, abusive, threatening, libelous, sexist, racist, homophobic, transphobic, or discriminatory in any other way.

points.title: You are prohibited from attempting to gain unauthorized access to other computer systems

case.title: You are prohibited from attempting to gain unauthorized access to other computer systems
case.description: The service does not allow any attempts at hacking or otherwise gaining unauthorized access to other users' computers.

points.title: Your personal data is used for automated decision-making, profiling or AI training

case.title: Your personal data is used for automated decision-making, profiling or AI training
case.description: Personal data or content you share with the service may be processed to make decisions by automated means without human involvement. This includes profiling, which is any form of automated processing of your information to analyse or predict things like your economic situation, health, personal preferences or interests; as well as Artificial Intelligence training.

points.title: Your personal information is used for many different purposes

case.title: Your personal information is used for many different purposes
case.description: Personal Data can be processed for many reasons, including non essential processing such as for advertising, marketing and analytics purposes.

points.title: Location data may be collected, used and/or shared

case.title: Location data may be collected, used and/or shared
case.description: Location-based information is collected and may be used and/or shared with third parties for purposes not directly related to the services provided (i.e. the Service doesn't rely on the use or share of location data to function properly).
